description_long: This is a modern two-story house surrounded by a variety of trees and landscaping, including tall cypress-like trees and flowering shrubs. The house features a flat roof with a rooftop terrace, large windows, and a mix of stone and glass materials on the exterior. The front entryway is defined by a paved path flanked by two tall, narrow trees, leading to a glass door. The rear of the house includes a glass-enclosed sunroom or patio area. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, providing ample natural light. The landscaping is lush and diverse, enhancing the contemporary aesthetic of the property.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and lush landscaping, including tall cypress trees and flowering shrubs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a paved path, flanked by tall cypress trees and surrounded by colorful landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the stone facade, rooftop terrace, and a glass-enclosed sunroom or patio on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back windows, glass sunroom, and a symmetrical arrangement of trees and shrubs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with dense landscaping, visible rooftop terrace, and the row of cypress trees along the side.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass sunroom
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a glass door, paved path, flanked by tall cypress trees, and minimalistic modern styling
